slides.title: The hidden cost of *smelling nice*
slides.sub: That signature scent may carry phthalates, chemicals tied to how your body ages. Here is the calmer choice.

slides.title: Fragrance is a loophole
slides.body: On a label, the single word fragrance can *hide dozens of chemicals*. Brands are not required to list what is inside.

slides.title: Meet phthalates
slides.body: Phthalates help scent linger in perfume, candles and cleaners. They are *linked to disrupted endocrine signaling*, the hormones that quietly run your body.

slides.title: A hidden chemical load
slides.body: Steady exposure adds up. Studies connect higher phthalate levels to *metabolic and reproductive aging*, the slow erosion of how you age.

slides.title: Choose fragrance-free
slides.body: Reach for fragrance-free or unscented products where you can. It is a simple way to *lower a load you cannot smell*.

slides.title: Small changes, repeated
slides.body: You do not need a chemical-free life. A few better choices, *made consistently*, are what move the needle over years.

slides.title: See how your habits *add up*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one daily Health Score, so the small choices you make can compound into healthier aging.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
The thing that makes a room smell expensive might be quietly working against you. 🌿

Synthetic fragrance often hides phthalates, chemicals linked to disrupted hormones and faster metabolic and reproductive aging. Choosing fragrance-free is a simple way to lower a chemical load you never notice. Save this for your next shopping trip. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the small daily choices into one clear score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Fragrance-Free Might Help You Age Better
